commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=31bb066fee4dd5f4b6b2dc9b9f5d160e05219003)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an exclusive-create `wx` fallback in `writeUsageCostCacheLockAtomically` when `fs.promises.link()` fails with `ENOTSUP`, `EPERM`, or `EOPNOTSUPP`.

PR surface: Source +12. Total +12 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main publishes `.usage-cost-cache.json.lock` with `fs.promises.link`, and `acquireUsageCostCacheRefreshLock` only handles `EEXIST`, so unsupported-link errors from the reported mount class escape refresh. I did not run a live SMB/NFS/virtiofs mount repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor real-environment proof or a maintainer proof override is still required, and automation cannot supply that external setup evidence for the PR author.

target.title: fix(infra): fall back to exclusive create when hard links are unsupported
target.author: dwc1997
